title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Jones Lang LaSalle - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Jones Lang LaSalle - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
